name: Web Design
prompts: Design a guitar brand website page, using two primary colors plus neutrals to build the entire page and strengthen brand recognition and contrast. Scene positioning: brand landing page, poster-style marketing, portfolio cover. Users expect a unified and distinctive two-color language. Visual design concept: pick one dark and one light or one warm and one cool primary color, and restrict core elements to this combination only; backgrounds can use gradients or large block divisions, with text kept in high contrast (use white/black strokes when necessary). Avoid introducing a third primary color that would break the purity. Material and texture: smooth gradients, simple geometry, low noise; buttons and cards echo the two-color scheme with solid fills or wireframes. Overall mood: unified, eye-catching, and strongly branded. The two-color palette delivers a clear tone, with clean visuals and memorable impact.

Design a sneaker culture introduction website page with a Hero section, a timeline of iconic sneaker evolution, street culture stories, and signature brand collaborations — streetwear, bold, with attitude.

Design a creative design website page from a Neo-Brutalism designer's perspective, combining brutalism's hard edges with saturated candy color blocks, bold outlines, and offset shadows. Visual design concept: thick borders, large rounded corners or hard-angled blocks, saturated pink/yellow/blue/green, bold sans-serif or monospace fonts; prominent offset shadows. Use stickers/hand-drawn elements to add playfulness while keeping layout divisions clear. Material and texture: solid fills, noise/stripe backgrounds, sticker/graffiti symbols; shadows are short but with clear offset, borders 2-4px. Avoid excessive glass and gradients. Overall mood: bold, playful yet orderly, like an interface made of colorful building blocks.

name: Mobile App
prompts: Design a fitness App. Create a complete user registration flow and a workout data dashboard page for a fitness tracking App, with charts that display daily exercise data.
Referencing Xiaohongshu's (Little Red Book) design style, help me design a discovery page for a content community App, featuring a waterfall card layout and search/filter functionality.

Design a youth-oriented city check-in social App called 'CityGo' with a bold, vibrant, Y2K retro-futuristic style. The primary colors are fluorescent green, electric purple, and bright yellow, with extensive use of bold sans-serif fonts and irregular sticker elements. The home page features a city map scattered with bubbles marking user-captured check-in spots; tapping a bubble opens a 3x3 photo grid. The post interface supports adding hand-drawn doodles, stickers, and glitch-art filters to photos. All buttons are large rounded pill shapes with a bouncy tap animation. The overall feel is like a digital version of a doodle sticker book.

name: Design System
prompts: Help me build a complete Design System, including a color system, typography hierarchy, spacing rules, and foundational component specification documentation.
Referencing Ant Design's style, design a component library specification for my admin management system, including button, form, table, and modal components.
Create a Design Token system for a mobile App that supports light/dark theme switching, and output a complete variable table for colors, border radii, and shadows.

name: Web App
prompts: Design a complete interface for a project management WebApp, including a dashboard overview, task kanban, team member management, and project settings pages. Style inspired by Linear—clean and efficient.

Design a resume-building Web App called 'Resume.io' with a clean, efficient, WYSIWYG style. Use a split-screen layout: the left side is the form editing area (collapsible panels for personal info, education, work experience, skills, etc.), and the right side displays a live preview of an A4-sized resume (with realistic shadows). The top bar allows switching between 6 template styles (minimalist black-and-white, business blue, designer colorful, academic serif, etc.), and the top-right corner has 'Download PDF' and 'Share Link' buttons. The preview on the right updates in real time as users edit, with modified fields briefly highlighted. The overall goal is to let users produce a high-quality resume within 10 minutes.

Design a SaaS data analytics platform WebApp interface, including data source connections, a visualization chart editor, report generation, and permission management modules. Professional business color scheme.

name: PPT Design
prompts: Create a 6-page PPT introducing Minecraft, with a cool and rich pixel-style layout and a pixel-themed design style.

Help me generate a set of launch event slide mockups for a Chinese-style wuxia open-world exploration game, including multiple main pages. The layout should be large and suitable for big-screen playback at the venue. Boldly use SVG decorations on the slides, keep page elements rich and refined, and showcase the game's art design, UI design, rich content, and other elements. Use "ai" mode wherever images need to be generated.

Create a master's thesis defense PPT, 10 pages total, in a rigorous academic style. The main colors use dark navy (#0F172A) for titles, charcoal gray (#334155) for body text, and academic red (#B91C1C) to highlight key findings, with a pure white background. The page structure is: cover, research background and significance, literature review, research questions and hypotheses, research methodology, experimental design, data analysis, main conclusions, limitations and future work, and acknowledgments. Charts use classic black-white-gray colors, with no gradients. Each page has a chapter number in the top-right corner to help the defense committee navigate quickly. Chinese fonts use Song; English uses Times New Roman. The footer includes the school logo, name, student ID, and date. The overall feel is restrained and professional, highlighting the academic value of the research.

Create a streamlined roadshow PPT for a Web3 NFT project, 9 pages total, in a 'Cyberpunk × Y2K Retro-Future' style. Use pure black (#000000) as the background, with acid fluorescent green (#C6FF00) and electric magenta (#FF006E) as the dual primary accent colors, and metallic silver (#C0C0C0) as a supporting color. The cover uses ASCII character art to spell out the project name, with a background of grid perspective lines extending toward a vanishing point to create a cyberspace feel. Title fonts use a glitch-effect pixel typeface with randomly offset characters and RGB color-split chromatic aberration. Inner page layouts break the conventional grid, with text carried on 45-degree skewed color blocks, and data displayed using seven-segment digital-tube fonts like an old calculator. The roadmap page uses a subway-map style with hexagonal nodes outlined with glowing strokes. On the team page, each member is shown as a 3D low-poly avatar placeholder (labeled 'Pixel Avatar') with an abbreviated wallet address below the name. The footer has a scrolling ticker showing '//TRANSMITTING DATA//' on loop. English fonts use VT323 and Space Mono; Chinese uses Source Han Mono. The overall vibe is rebellious, gritty, and rooted in internet underground culture.

Create an investment pitch PPT for an Omakase Japanese cuisine franchise, 10 pages total, in a 'Wabi-sabi aesthetic × Extreme negative space' style. Use rice-white paper color (#F5F0E8) as the main background, with ink black (#1A1A1A) and cinnabar red (#B8292E) accents in key positions. Negative space occupies more than 70% of each page; text is sparse and restrained, often with just a single line plus a stamp-like mark per page. The cover features only a hand-brushed calligraphy character 'Sushi' in cinnabar red in the bottom-left corner, with a vertical line of small text in the top-right noting the brand name—the rest is blank. Titles use a Japanese calligraphy style mixing kana and kanji; body text uses an ultra-thin sans-serif. All divider lines are replaced with hand-drawn ink brushstrokes. Data pages break conventional charts, presenting key numbers as haiku-style short phrases arranged vertically, such as 'Ichigo Ichie / Eight Seats / Thirty-Six Courses'. The franchise policy page unfolds as a Japanese scroll, read from right to left. Image placeholders use Japanese square-seal styles and irregular ink-blot shapes (labeled 'Dish Photo', 'Chef Portrait'). Chinese fonts use Source Han Serif Ultra-Light; Japanese uses Tsukushi Mincho. The overall feel is tranquil, restrained, and zen-like, conveying brand tone over information density.

Create a PPT for an AI hardware product launch event, 10 pages total, in a 'Minimalist Futurism × Dieter Rams homage' style. Use pure light gray-white (#F5F5F7) as the main background, near-black (#1D1D1F) for text, and the product's signature bright orange (#FF5C1A) as the sole accent color used only for key data. The entire deck follows the 'less is more' principle: each page has at most 7 characters as the title, with body text under 20 characters. The cover shows only the three-letter product name 'ORB' centered, at a font size occupying 1/3 of the screen height, with a small '2026 - 04 - 15' line below. The product showcase page uses a fully centered single-element composition: the product image placeholder is a perfect circle at the center (labeled 'Product Hero Shot'), surrounded by abundant breathing space, with a small model number line at the bottom. The spec comparison page uses ultra-fine 1px divider lines to split the page into an equal grid, with each cell containing only one number and one word (such as '12h' and 'Battery Life'). On data pages, numbers use monospace fonts enlarged to exaggerated sizes, with units after numbers set as tiny superscripts. English fonts use SF Pro Display and SF Mono; Chinese uses PingFang. The overall feel is calm, premium, and full of breathing space, making the product itself the sole protagonist.

name: Interactive Prototype
prompts: Help me design an interactive prototype for a task management tool, including switching between board view and list view, as well as task drag-and-drop reordering.

Design a personal health data Dashboard with a minimalist medical style. Use pale cyan-white (#F0F7F7) as the main background, with tech blue (#0EA5E9) and vibrant green (#22C55E) as accent colors to indicate positive health metrics. The top section contains a 'Today Overview' card with four circular progress rings showing steps, heart rate, sleep, and calories. Below that are a weekly trend line chart and a monthly calendar check-in view with the ability to switch between them. Cards are uniformly white with a light blue border and 12px rounded corners. Use a clear sans-serif font, with large prominent type for data values. The overall feel is fresh and trustworthy, emphasizing clear data presentation.
Design an interactive prototype for a data visualization large-screen display, supporting time-range filtering, chart drill-down, and full-screen display mode switching.

name: Brand Design
prompts: Design a tech-style brand Logo with deep blue as the primary color, suitable for an AI product. It should be simple and recognizable, and also provide standard color values and usage guidelines.
Design a complete visual identity system for my coffee brand, including Logo, color palette, typography guidelines, and business card style, with a warm and artistic style.
Referencing the design styles of Apple and Stripe, design the brand identity for my SaaS product, including the main Logo, icon variations, and brand color palette.

name: Icons & Illustrations
prompts: Help me design a set of 24 linear-style general-purpose icons suitable for a backend management system, covering common scenarios such as Home, Users, Settings, and Data.
Design a set of cute-style illustrated icons for a children's education App, covering 12 scenes across the themes of reading, math, music, and science.
Design a set of flat-style financial icons covering 16 scenarios such as payment, billing, wallet, transfer, and wealth management, with a unified color scheme.

name: Visual Posters
prompts: Help me design a promotional poster for a product launch event with the theme of AI innovation, size 1080x1920, highlighting the launch date and product highlights.
Design a set of e-commerce Banners for the Double 11 sales event, 3 banners in different sizes with a unified style, emphasizing discount information and a limited-time flash sale atmosphere.
Design an event poster for a tech summit, highlighting the headshots of three speakers, the event time and location, and the registration QR code.
